formatter_aggregator_complete: FormatOutput receives action, build_id, status, logs, builds_list, error from parent (sourced from various children). Returns output to parent. Complete path.
conversion_notes: 10-child conditional dispatch with aggregator. Complex but all parent-mediated. FormatOutput.aggregate role collects from multiple children via parent. Trigger workflow: ParseAndValidateInput -> CheckBuildConstraint -> CreateBuildRecord -> RunCompilation -> RunTests -> PackageArtifacts (sequential within parent). Status/List/Cancel are independent query paths. All dataflow edges are parent<->child. No types in Stage1 — will default to Any/dict. Note: FormatOutput input sources reference multiple children (CreateBuildRecord|QueryBuildStatus|CancelBuild) — this is aggregate input from parent mediation, not sibling calls.
